notes: 6.5: fixes plugin installs dying with 'No solution found' — a too-new numpy (>=2.5) pulled in by any plugin made the Video/Audio voice stack permanently unresolvable (restarts didn't help); env-wide dependency caps (plugins/constraints.txt) now apply to every plugin install/upgrade, and already-affected machines self-heal by downgrading numpy when the plugin is reinstalled. / 6.5：修复插件安装报 'No solution found'（任一插件把过新的 numpy(≥2.5) 带进环境后，视频/语音插件永远装不上、重启也无效）；现在所有插件安装/升级统一应用全局版本约束（plugins/constraints.txt），已中招的电脑更新后重装插件会自动降级 numpy 恢复。
